.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 0.5%, 96%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(258, 0.5%, 96%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 0.5%, 96%) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 0.5%, 96%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(258, 0.5%, 96%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(258, 0.5%, 96%) 65%, transparent))
body.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
body.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(0, 176, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(255, 6, 93, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 82, 82, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(124, 77, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 82, 82, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 184, 212, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(68, 138, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 160, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 200, 83, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 191, 165, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 184, 212, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 145, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

html.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(138, 92, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(221, 221, 221) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

strong.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

svg.lucide-list.svg-icon.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

svg.lucide-pencil.svg-icon.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
